description: Evidence checklist for proving self-hosted LiveKit on AWS before public use.

items.command: Deploy with LIVEKIT_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=self-hosted, join from a home network, capture chrome://webrtc-internals, and confirm the selected pair uses the NLB UDP media port.
items.evidence_required: webrtc-internals dump, selected ICE candidate pair, NLB target health, and LiveKit participant connection logs.
items.pass_criteria: At least two external networks establish direct UDP media to the advertised LiveKit endpoint without TCP fallback.

items.command: Join from a restricted network with direct UDP blocked and confirm embedded TURN/UDP relays audio and video.
items.evidence_required: webrtc-internals relay candidate, TURN listener health, and uninterrupted audio/video for 10 minutes.
items.pass_criteria: Participant media remains connected through relay candidates with no audible dropouts.

items.command: Enable LIVEKIT_TURN_TLS_ENABLED and join from a network that only permits TCP/TLS egress.
items.evidence_required: TURN/TLS DNS record, ACM certificate ARN, relay candidate evidence, and LiveKit connection logs.
items.pass_criteria: Browser connects through TURN/TLS and keeps media alive for 10 minutes.

items.command: Join a live meeting, refresh one participant browser, and verify the same participant identity rejoins without losing meeting state.
items.evidence_required: browser console log, app WebSocket reconnect log, LiveKit participant leave/join log, and meeting control center state before/after.
items.pass_criteria: Participant rejoins in under 10 seconds and the agent keeps prior spoken/not-spoken/blocker state.

items.command: Disable Wi-Fi for 15 seconds during a meeting, re-enable it, and capture room recovery behavior.
items.evidence_required: client timestamps, LiveKit reconnect events, transcript continuity, and absence of duplicate Jira mutations.
items.pass_criteria: Client reconnects, duplicate suppression holds, and the agent does not repeat already-executed Jira writes.

items.command: Create or verify alarms for LiveKit task restarts, unhealthy NLB targets, Redis saturation, and app LiveKit token failures.
items.evidence_required: CloudWatch alarm ARNs, metric math or metric names, thresholds, and a forced-alarm screenshot or alarm history entry.
items.pass_criteria: Each alarm enters ALARM during a controlled failure and returns OK after recovery.

items.command: Force Nova Sonic stream restart conditions and verify app logs/metrics produce an alarmable signal.
items.evidence_required: CloudWatch log query, alarm definition, and alert history for Bedrock stream restart or failure count.
items.pass_criteria: A failed or rapidly restarting Bedrock stream is visible within 2 minutes.

items.command: Run a Terraform/Terragrunt plan with LIVEKIT_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=cloud and LIVEKIT_CLOUD_URL set.
items.evidence_required: Plan output showing self-hosted LiveKit ECS/NLB/Redis resources skipped and app configured with the LiveKit Cloud URL.
items.pass_criteria: Plan contains no self-hosted LiveKit task, NLB, or Redis creation and keeps app service intact.

items.command: Deploy cloud mode, join two participants, and run a 10-minute standup smoke test.
items.evidence_required: LiveKit Cloud room analytics, app logs, transcript events, and Jira mutation audit entries.
items.pass_criteria: Both participants hear the agent, transcripts flow, and Jira write-through behavior matches the local fixture expectations.
